# Consuelo

Consuelo is open-source sales infrastructure for insurance sales teams. The public website, docs, and blog explain the platform. The authenticated app handles crm records, dialer workflows, ai coaching, and team operations.

- canonical website: https://consuelohq.com
- docs: https://docs.consuelohq.com
- blog: https://consuelohq.com/blog
- public repo: https://github.com/consuelohq/opensaas
- authenticated app: https://app.consuelohq.com

## Start Here

- homepage: https://consuelohq.com
- mercury: https://consuelohq.com/mercury
- docs home: https://docs.consuelohq.com
- dialer docs: https://docs.consuelohq.com/user-guide/dialer/overview
- highlevel overview: https://docs.consuelohq.com/user-guide/highlevel/overview
- graphql api overview: https://docs.consuelohq.com/user-guide/graphql-api/overview
- blog index: https://consuelohq.com/blog

## Public Read-Only Surfaces

- marketing pages and blog posts on `consuelohq.com`
- public documentation on `docs.consuelohq.com`
- open-source repository, readme, and code on github
- rss feed: https://consuelohq.com/rss.xml
- sitemap: https://consuelohq.com/sitemap-index.xml

## Authenticated Surfaces

- `https://app.consuelohq.com` requires authentication
- crm data, contacts, companies, lists, tasks, analytics, and settings are authenticated
- most write actions, data exports, and workspace-specific queries require a signed-in user or workspace token

## For Agents

- use the public website and docs for product understanding first
- treat docs pages as the canonical source for user-facing behavior
- treat the github repository as the canonical source for implementation details
- do not assume access to customer data, call recordings, or private workspace state without authentication

## Safety And Boundaries

- do not attempt account creation, data mutation, or third-party integration setup without user intent and consent
- highlevel installs, oauth connections, billing actions, and telephony changes require explicit user action
- respect robots policy and authenticated boundaries

## Developer Entry Points

- repo readme: https://github.com/consuelohq/opensaas/blob/main/README.md
- docs package: https://docs.consuelohq.com
- user guide intro: https://docs.consuelohq.com/user-guide/introduction
